email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Sales Support Administrator voor de Nordics/Baltics/Balkan bij Michael Page International (Belgium). Uw omschrijving sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in klantgerichte rollen en mijn technische achtergrond.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor order-to-cash processen in de context van SEO-projecten, waarbij ik nauw samenwerk met interne teams en klanten. Daarnaast heb ik bij Katoen Natie ervaring opgedaan in een logistieke omgeving, waar nauwkeurigheid en stressbestendigheid essentieel waren. Mijn kennis van SAP (via cursussen) en mijn analytische vaardigheden met tools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush maken mij een sterke kandidaat voor deze functie.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is op B1-niveau (met actieve lessen). Ik ben leergierig, accuraat en werk graag in een internationaal team.

Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop op een gesprek om mijn motivatie verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Sales Support Administrator position for the Nordics/Baltics/Balkan region at Michael Page International (Belgium). The job description aligns perfectly with my experience in customer-facing roles and my technical background.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage order-to-cash processes within SEO projects, collaborating closely with internal teams and clients. Additionally, my experience at Katoen Natie in a logistics environment has honed my accuracy and stress resilience. My knowledge of SAP (through coursework) and analytical skills with tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush make me a strong candidate for this role.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is at B1 level (with active lessons). I am eager to learn, accurate, and enjoy working in an international team.

I have attached my CV and cover letter. I look forward to discussing my motivation further.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste lezer,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Sales Support Administrator voor de Nordics/Baltics/Balkan regio bij Michael Page International (Belgium). Uw omschrijving van een internationale, groeiende organisatie spreekt mij zeer aan, en ik ben ervan overtuigd dat mijn ervaring en vaardigheden goed aansluiten bij deze rol.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het volledige order-to-cash proces in de context van digitale projecten. Ik verwerk bestellingen, volg leveringen op, en zorg voor facturatie en after-sales ondersteuning. Daarnaast werk ik nauw samen met accountmanagers en interne afdelingen zoals marketing en logistiek om de commerciële strategie te implementeren. Deze ervaring heeft mij geleerd om accuraat en stressbestendig te werken, en om problemen oplossingsgericht aan te pakken.

Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling en SEO geeft mij een uniek perspectief. Ik ben bekend met SAP (via cursussen) en tools zoals Google Analytics, SEMrush en Ahrefs, waarmee ik data-gedreven beslissingen kan ondersteunen. Bij Katoen Natie heb ik bovendien ervaring opgedaan in een logistieke omgeving, wat mij vertrouwd maakt met supply chain processen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is op B1-niveau (met actieve lessen). Ik ben een teamspeler met een diplomatieke en assertieve communicatiestijl, en ik ben gewend om zowel intern als extern te coördineren.

Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn carrière te starten in sales support en bij te dragen aan de groei van uw organisatie. Ik hoop op een gesprek om mijn motivatie verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear reader,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Sales Support Administrator position for the Nordics/Baltics/Balkan region at Michael Page International (Belgium). Your description of an international, growing organization appeals to me greatly, and I am confident that my experience and skills align well with this role.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage the entire order-to-cash process within digital projects. I process orders, follow up on deliveries, and handle invoicing and after-sales support. Additionally, I collaborate closely with account managers and internal departments such as marketing and logistics to implement the commercial strategy. This experience has taught me to work accurately and under pressure, and to approach problems with a solution-oriented mindset.

My technical background in web development and SEO gives me a unique perspective. I am familiar with SAP (through coursework) and tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs, enabling data-driven decision-making. My experience at Katoen Natie in a logistics environment has also familiarized me with supply chain processes.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is at B1 level (with active lessons). I am a team player with a diplomatic and assertive communication style, accustomed to coordinating both internally and externally.

I am motivated to start my career in sales support and contribute to your organization's growth. I look forward to discussing my motivation further.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Order-to-cash process experience: order processing, follow-up, invoicing, and after-sales support in current role at Episto
• Strong internal and external coordination: daily collaboration with account managers, marketing, logistics, and clients
• Analytical skills: using Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Search Console to support data-driven decisions
• SAP knowledge (via coursework) and technical aptitude with web tools
• Fluent English and Turkish; Dutch B1 (actively improving); accurate, stress-resistant, and solution-oriented
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO. At Episto, I manage the order-to-cash process for client projects, including order processing, follow-up, invoicing, and after-sales support, while coordinating with account managers and internal teams. I also build and maintain WordPress sites, write SEO content, and track performance with analytics tools. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data and technical audits. Comfortable across customer support, logistics coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Order-to-cash process: order processing, follow-up, invoicing, after-sales support
- Customer & internal coordination: liaison with account managers, logistics, marketing, production
- Product & pricing management: proposing equivalent products, discounting, price list preparation (via CRM)
- CRM & data tools: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- SAP: basic knowledge (via coursework)
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)
- Soft skills: diplomatic and assertive communication, problem-solving, result-oriented, accurate, stress-resistant

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage order-to-cash process for client SEO projects: order processing, follow-up, invoicing, and after-sales support
- Coordinate with account managers and internal teams (logistics, marketing) to ensure smooth project execution
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Gained understanding of supply chain and inventory processes

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
